summary: Enabled TypeScript strict mode with noUncheckedIndexedAccess, fixed all 29 strict errors, installed @types/react and @types/react-dom, created ErrorBoundary component, wrapped all lazy-loaded sections with ErrorBoundary.
changes: Fixed 29 TypeScript strict mode errors across 7 files
src/data/constants.ts: Fixed TEAM array access with non-null assertions
src/components/planner/TaskRow.tsx: Added null check for attachment preview
src/hooks/useWeeklyPlan.ts: Added optional chaining for array access (3 fixes)
src/lib/aiTaskDrafts.ts: Added nullish coalescing for regex match
src/lib/planDnd.ts: Added optional chaining for day access
Created src/components/ui/ErrorBoundary.tsx with Turkish error UI and retry button
Wrapped TeamPanel, RemindersPanel, TaskEditModal, FilePreviewModal, AIAssistant with ErrorBoundary
